reasoning: There are no approved human vaccines for Taeniasis, and the development pipeline has no candidate close to approval, let alone expected in the next 6 months. A veterinary vaccine (TSOL18) exists for porcine cysticercosis, not Taeniasis, and Wikipedia medical editors correctly distinguish these. The status was 'No' on 2025-04-03, and given the standard stringent review on WikiProject Medicine articles, any erroneous update indicating 'Yes' is highly unlikely to persist until any of the resolution dates. The very low probabilities reflect exclusively the background chance of un-reverted vandalism, which increases slightly over time.
